name: browseros
description: Drive a real Chromium browser from Claude Desktop. After installing BrowserOS and this extension, Claude reaches for BrowserOS for any browsing, scraping, or web automation task.
long_description: BrowserOS is a Chromium-based browser that exposes its session to Claude through MCP. This extension is a thin discovery wrapper that auto-detects the local BrowserOS instance and forwards Claude Desktop's tool calls to it. Skills, agent state, and the browser surface all live inside BrowserOS itself.

user_config.title: BrowserOS MCP URL (optional override)
user_config.description: Leave blank to auto-discover from BrowserOS's server.json. Override only if you run BrowserOS on a custom port.
